prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GT3582R (82mm) turbocharger** (twin-scroll, ball-bearing) for the **4.0L V8 TFSI (EA839/CGW) engine**, paired with **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 compression)** and **Manley H-beam connecting rods** to handle 650+ HP on **Motul 300V 5W-40** full-synthetic oil. Requires **Bosch Motorsport 1,000cc high-flow fuel injectors** and a **Syvecs S12 ECU** for precise boost control (targeting 24 psi peak on **98 RON + E85 blend**).

Install a **Wagner Tuning Competition intercooler kit (front-mount, 100% aluminum, 3.5L core volume)** with **Samco Sport silicone charge pipes (4-ply, 3-inch diameter)** to eliminate heat soak, reducing intake temps by 40°C under full load. Pair with a **034 Motorsport billet aluminum thermostat housing** to optimize coolant flow for the **CGW engine’s thermal management system**.

Replace the factory **ZF 8HP70 8-speed transmission** with a **Reis Performance Stage 3 clutch pack (multi-plate, carbon-fiber friction material)** and **FTX Racing billet torque converter (3,800 RPM stall, 2.6:1 torque multiplication)**. Upgrade the **Bentley-specific rear differential (40:90 ratio)** with a **Quaife ATB helical LSD** and **GKN Driveline CV joints (heavy-duty, 30-spline)** for 0-60 mph launches under 3.5 seconds.
estetica: Fit a **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (carbon fiber, GT3-spec fenders)** with **custom 3M Satin Matte Black wrap (2080 series)** and **Vorsteiner V-FF107 forged wheels (21x10.5 ET30 front, 21x12.5 ET40 rear)** in **Gunmetal finish**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 R21 front, 325/25 R21 rear)** for aggressive stance and track-ready grip.

Install a **Novitec Torado front splitter (carbon fiber, 3-piece)** with **custom Bentley-specific canards (3D-printed ABS, wind-tunnel tested)** and a **Rear Diffuser by Prior Design (carbon fiber, 5-fin design)** to reduce lift by 35% at 150 mph. Paint the **Bentley matrix grille** in **Bare Carbon Fiber (clear-coated)** and add **LED DRLs by LUX Hella (RGB, sequential turn signals)** for a modernized look.

Replace the factory exhaust with a **Capristo 102RS Valvetronic system (Inconel 625 headers, 3.5-inch titanium tips, electronically controlled flaps)** tuned to produce a **900Hz rasp at 4,500 RPM** while maintaining Bentley’s signature V8 burble at idle. Pair with **Brembo GT-R 6-piston calipers (400mm front rotors, 380mm rear)** in **Gloss Red** with **Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel lines** for a track-ready brake setup.
